source.title: The Pope, Deepfakes & the Future of Media | Catholic Futurist

summary.title_hr: Papa, deepfakeovi i budućnost medija | Katolički futurist
summary.abstract_hr: Ova epizoda podcasta istražuje utjecaj umjetne inteligencije (AI) i deepfakeova na medije, s posebnim naglaskom na katolički kontekst. Razgovara se o izazovima razlučivanja istine od dezinformacija, prilikama koje AI nudi za evangelizaciju te ključnoj ulozi Crkve u formiranju i podršci 'digitalnim misionarima'. Naglašava se potreba za snažnom katoličkom formacijom i odgovornošću tehnoloških platformi u borbi protiv obmanjujućeg sadržaja.
key_points: AI može olakšati rad katoličkih tvoraca sadržaja, ali istovremeno stvara masovnu produkciju nekvalitetnog i potencijalno lažnog sadržaja, uključujući deepfakeove pape.
Izazov je razlučiti istinu od deepfakeova, a rješenje leži u snažnoj katoličkoj formaciji vjernika i povratku izvornim izvorima vjere.
AI nudi prilike za evangelizaciju, poput kloniranja glasa za dosezanje različitih jezičnih skupina, ali deepfakeovi s pogrešnim doktrinarnim sadržajem mogu uzrokovati masovne probleme.
Tehnološke platforme trebaju preuzeti odgovornost za označavanje sadržaja generiranog umjetnom inteligencijom, posebno kada se radi o javnim osobama, što bi trebao postati univerzalni standard.
Crkva prepoznaje internet kao novu misionarsku granicu i poziva na formiranje i podršku 'digitalnim misionarima' koji evangeliziraju u digitalnom prostoru.
Lokalni biskupi i svećenici trebaju razvijati duboke i smislene odnose s katoličkim influencerima, prateći ih i podržavajući u njihovoj misiji dovođenja ljudi u Crkvu.
Vatikan bi trebao preuzeti vodstvo u zagovaranju protiv zlouporabe AI-ja i deepfakeova, koristeći svoj utjecaj za zaštitu integriteta informacija i osobnosti.
summary.title_en: Pope, deepfakes and the future of media | Catholic futurist
summary.abstract_en: This episode of the podcast explores the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) and deepfakes on media, with a special emphasis on the Catholic context. It discusses the challenges of discerning truth from misinformation, the opportunities that AI offers for evangelization, and the key role of the Church in forming and supporting 'digital missionaries'. It emphasizes the need for strong Catholic formation and the responsibility of technological platforms in the fight against deceptive content.
key_points_en: AI can facilitate the work of Catholic content creators, but at the same time creates mass production of low-quality and potentially false content, including deepfakes of the pope.
The challenge is to discern truth from deepfakes, and the solution lies in strong Catholic formation of the faithful and a return to the original sources of faith.
AI offers opportunities for evangelization, such as voice cloning for reaching different linguistic groups, but deepfakes with incorrect doctrinal content can cause massive problems.
Technological platforms should take responsibility for marking content generated by artificial intelligence, especially when it concerns public figures, which should become a universal standard.
The Church recognizes the internet as a new missionary frontier and calls for the formation and support of 'digital missionaries' who evangelize in the digital space.
Local bishops and priests should develop deep and meaningful relationships with Catholic influencers, accompanying them and supporting them in their mission of bringing people into the Church.
The Vatican should take the lead in advocating against the misuse of AI and deepfakes, using its influence to protect the integrity of information and personality.
